utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these items. Each item is fully specified: health_coverage includes physical and mental health and cost; property_coverage includes home/contents and cost; travel_coverage includes travel and cost; additional_services lists enhancement services and cost; total_budget provides monthly and annual breakdowns. Therefore, all 5 items are included and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final coverage plan lists 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage53' as the source for health, property, and travel coverage. The ground-truth ratings include 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' for health and travel, and 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage' for property. Therefore, we map these three coverage components to their respective ratings from the dataset: health → InsurePlus Standard Plan (rating 6), property → InsurePlus Standard Coverage (rating 7), and travel → InsurePlus Standard Plan (rating 7). There are also one-time additional services costing €170, which correspond to 'Premium Insurance Membership' (€150 one-time, rating 10) and an extra €20 one-time fee that could be part of the same service bundle. Thus, the final mapping includes these four items with their ratings.
